name: io.github.cmendezs/mcp-facturacion-electronica-es
description: Spanish e-invoicing MCP server: VERI*FACTU, Facturae/FACe, SII, TicketBAI, Crea y Crece B2B.

environmentVariables.name: AEAT_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Target environment for AEAT endpoints: 'sandbox' or 'production'.

environmentVariables.name: AEAT_CERTIFICATE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path to the FNMT-RCM PKCS#12 certificate (.p12 / .pfx) used for MTLS submission to AEAT (VERI*FACTU and SII).

environmentVariables.name: AEAT_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Passphrase for the PKCS#12 certificate at AEAT_CERTIFICATE_PATH.

environmentVariables.name: AEAT_NIF
environmentVariables.description: Taxpayer NIF used as the default submitter identity for AEAT submissions.

environmentVariables.name: FACE_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Target environment for FACe API: 'sandbox' or 'production'.

environmentVariables.name: FACE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client ID for FACe B2B REST API v2.

environmentVariables.name: FACE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client secret for FACe B2B REST API v2.

environmentVariables.name: TICKETBAI_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Target environment for TicketBAI provincial endpoints: 'sandbox' or 'production'.

environmentVariables.name: TICKETBAI_CERTIFICATE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path to the PKCS#12 certificate used to sign TicketBAI XML records.

environmentVariables.name: TICKETBAI_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Passphrase for the PKCS#12 certificate at TICKETBAI_CERTIFICATE_PATH.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging level inherited from mcp-einvoicing-core: DEBUG, INFO (default), WARNING, or ERROR.
